texoclaim-chain memory
agentledgerdrift
stream

claim-chain memory · append-only · receipts on every answer

Memory that knows
when to stop believing things.

Every fact you state becomes a journaled claim. When a fact changes, the old claim isn't buried in a vector index — it'sstruck, sealed with a receipt, and superseded on the record. Git tracks code diffs. texo tracks claim diffs.

journal · canonicalfrontier 0047replayed · deterministic
the supersession

A fact changed. Here's the receipt.

  1. Alice owns release approval.

    meeting_notes.md:3 · seq 09 · superseded → claim_854bcc

  2. └─ retired by ─┐receipt 42abd965 · seq 15

  3. Ben owns release approval now.

    meeting_notes.md:5 · seq 15 · current

Deploys happen on Friday. / Deploys moved to Wednesday.

two live sources · no temporal order · conflict — surfaced, not guessed

The heuristic floor can't tell these apart — same subject, different words. TheQwen relation judge retires the superseded ones and surfaces genuine contradictions as conflicts, rather than silently trusting the newer sentence.

memory · live
frontier
—
current
—
stale
—
conflict
—
settlement
—
